## What type of submission?

- [ ] **Platform** — adding/updating entries in `data/sites/*.yaml`
- [ ] **Repo / Tool** — adding/updating entries in `data/repos/*.yaml`

### Checklist (Platforms)

- [ ] I added/updated entries only in `data/sites/*.yaml`
- [ ] Each new entry uses the correct `category`
- [ ] I included required fields (`name`, `url`, `category`, `description`)
- [ ] I included a `sampleProfile` (public profile URL, not homepage)
- [ ] URLs are valid and publicly accessible
- [ ] I did not modify unrelated categories or entries

### Checklist (Repos / Tools)

- [ ] I added/updated entries only in `data/repos/*.yaml`
- [ ] Each new entry uses the correct `category`
- [ ] I included required fields (`name`, `repo`, `url`, `category`, `description`, `stars`, `type`)
- [ ] Repo has at least 10 GitHub stars
- [ ] Repo is not archived, not a fork
- [ ] I did not modify unrelated categories or entries

### What changed?

- Category file(s):
- Name(s):
- Type of change: (new / update / fix)

### Notes for maintainers

Anything specific to review?
